name: Cleanup attachments
description: Admin tool: delete stored user attachments older than N days (rows + files). Restricted to super agents.

function.name: cleanup_attachments
function.description: Delete attachment files and database rows older than `older_than_days` days. Returns the deleted count and freed bytes. Only super agents may invoke this tool.

older_than_days.description: Maximum age in days (default: 7). Attachments older than this will be permanently removed.
